subject: English
title: Weathering the Storm in Ersama – Hard Short Notes

key_points: The 1999 super cyclone devastated villages in Orissa, destroying homes and lives
Prashant’s journey through floodwaters highlights human courage
Community shelters became centres of survival and cooperation
Relief activities such as food distribution and shelter cleaning helped recovery
The story emphasises resilience and collective responsibility
characters: Prashant – Symbolises courage, leadership, and compassion
Villagers – Represent resilience and collective strength
Orphaned Children and Widows – Symbolise vulnerability after disasters
themes: Resilience in the face of natural disasters
literary_devices: Imagery – Vivid descriptions of devastation highlight the cyclone’s impact
Symbolism – The cyclone symbolises nature’s uncontrollable power
Contrast – Between destruction and the rebuilding efforts of villagers
exam_tips: Analyse Prashant’s leadership as a central idea
Discuss resilience and unity as major themes
Include examples of relief work and community support
Explain how the story inspires readers through courage and cooperation
